title: Erosion and Earth's Surface Study Guide

contentProfile.primarySkill: Understanding erosion processes and Earth's geography
contentProfile.assignmentFormat: Study guide with sections covering key concepts

questions.question: What causes erosion?
questions.correctAnswer: Wind, water, and ice wear away rocks and soil
questions.hint: Think about what natural forces can wear things away

questions.question: Where does the color of beach sand come from?
questions.hint: Consider the source of sand particles

questions.question: What do rivers and rain carry?
In which direction do rivers usually flow?
questions.correctAnswer: Downhill from mountains to oceans or lakes
questions.hint: Does water flow up or down?

questions.question: What does a compass rose show?
questions.hint: This helps you navigate on a map

questions.question: How are rounded hills different from pointy peaks?
questions.correctAnswer: Rounded hills are smaller and softer; pointy peaks are tall and sharp
